events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need evaluate scenario. Scenario: closeout photos for transformers dry-type & pad-mount show installed work following referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, terminations shown in place, inspection card no open correction note. Stage rough-complete. References NEC Art 450, 250.30. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no defects described, work follows detail, clearances labels supports terminations in place, inspection card clean. Likely pass. Need include rationale referencing NEC Art 450 (transformer requirements) and 250.30 (grounding). Component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. Work_stage rough-complete. Percent_complete maybe 90? Rough-complete installed assembled not closed out. Value not asked 0. Sound etc default. Findings empty. Actions empty. Risk low. Need ensure valid JSON.
